note: Concludes BCG = BCA (the lesser = the greater). This is a contradiction requiring C.N.5 (whole > part), not C.N.1.
This is a conclusion from adding (C.N.2), not from Prop.13. Step 5 incorrectly cites Prop.13; the conclusion follows from step 4 (C.N.2) applied to angle sums.
Step 11 concludes AGH is not unequal to GHD (i.e., equal). Step 12 must apply C.N.1 (things equal to same = equal) from the contradiction in step 11, not Prop.15.
From step 13 (AGH = EGB) and step 12 (AGH = GHD), we get EGB = GHD by C.N.1 (transitive), not C.N.2 (addition).
Step 15 adds BGH to both sides (C.N.2). Step 16 concludes equality. This is the result of C.N.2, not Prop.13.
